【Extreme Creature: Void Sparrow】

【Perfect Ancestral Fu: Space】

【Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu: Time】

【Perfect Grade Ancestral Endowment: Speed】

Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu: Torn

This Extreme Creature named the Void Sparrow has four Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments, which is nothing, after all, it is not without creatures that have four Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments.

The key is that there is another talent, which Ye Tian did not even detect.

【？？？】

It's just a bunch of hellos, Ye Tian can't find out, it's not that this talent hasn't been bred yet, so it can't be displayed.

Because other talents can be detected, even if they are not intact, they can be explored.

However, this talent is completely undetectable, indicating that its level is too high.

Moreover, copying a talent can also detect the fluctuation of talent, and this talent definitely surpasses the perfection level of the ancestral endowment.

If it is really a talent of this level, then the copy talent may not be able to be copied, so its talent level is higher than that of the copy talent, otherwise the copy talent will be upgraded and transformed again.

"Void Sparrow, once this kind of extreme path creature is born, its strength is afraid that it is comparable to that of a perfect controller, and with a little cultivation, it is enough to be comparable to a super-perfect controller, and when it grows to the extreme, it may be comparable to a perfect controller of the extreme realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

His first thought was to take this Void Sparrow away, after all, such an extreme creature was so valuable!

However, just as he was about to enter the place where the Void Sparrow was born, his physical body was directly shattered and annihilated.

......

Mt. Gokumi.

"Long Wu's copy body is dead?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Fortunately, the dragon crow's copy body was also very powerful, and it was silently annihilated by the breeding ground of the Void Sparrow.

"No wonder that Void Sparrow has always been able to breed safely, it turns out that it is too dangerous there, and other Extreme Path creatures don't dare to enter it at all!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

However, he can now replicate the Void Sparrow Egg.

"Fortunately, after the replication talent was upgraded last time, any copy body can carry the copy talent, even if it does not copy the main body, copy other creatures, it can also carry the mark of the copy talent, so as to use the ability of the copy talent, otherwise the dragon crow copy body will not be able to copy the talent of detecting the void sparrow. Ye Tian said darkly.

Strictly speaking, the last time the replication talent was upgraded, you can copy one more body, the perception range is increased, and at the same time you can copy any creature, you can use the replication talent with those creatures, and there is another ability, that is, to copy other people's perfect control skills, and then release it, the attack power and breath are all exactly the same.

Of course, Ye Tian has not used this function so far, because it is more chicken.

However, copying someone else's perfect mastery can also form a mark for someone else to use once.

But Ye Tian didn't want to expose his ability to copy his talent, so he hadn't used it yet.

this day.

Nine Rivers Void.

Ye Tian is here to prepare to copy the Void Sparrow Egg to see what the mystery of this extreme creature is.

Although the copy is just an egg, not a bred Void Sparrow, at least something can be seen.

Airplanes!

The replication is on!

However, Ye Tian found that this copy was very difficult and slow, obviously because the Void Dark Sparrow Egg was not simple.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai finally copied the Void Sparrow Egg.

And this Void Sparrow Egg is also Ye Tian's copy body.

But at this time, Ye Tian found that he had not copied the talent that he couldn't perceive, obviously the level of the copied talent was low, and he didn't copy it.

But that's enough, except for the lack of that unknown talent, everything else is copied exactly the same.

Since the Void Sparrow Egg had not been conceived, Ye Tian could not exert himself at present, so he could only stay here in the form of an egg.

"Let's try to go to enlightenment!"

Ye Tian began to comprehend the power of the Golden Extreme Dao.

At this realization, Ye Tian was suddenly shocked.

"This effect is so good!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

His potential was already very rebellious, and the speed at which he comprehended the Extreme Dao was extremely fast, but the speed at which this Void Soul Sparrow comprehended the Extreme Dao was even faster than him, it was simply abnormal.

"Tearing the Perfection Grade Ancestral Fu also has something to do with the Golden Extreme Dao, so it is very quick to comprehend the Golden Extreme Dao. "

Of course.

After Ye Tian tested it, he found that the speed of the Enlightenment Space Pole, Time Pole, and Speed Pole was the fastest.

Although he had already comprehended the Extreme Dao of Space and the Extreme Dao of Time, he could still continue to comprehend.

And he hasn't comprehended the speed pole yet, and he can comprehend the speed pole next time.

"Hahaha, in the future, even if the cultivation time of the space-time ancestral realm runs out, with the Void Soul Sparrow, the speed of attaining the Extreme Dao will not be slow!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he also had an idea, that is, to swallow the Void Sparrow.

Although he can replicate the body of the Void Sparrow, he is not a Void Sparrow himself, even if he completely abandons the human body and cultivates with the body of the Void Sparrow in the future, he still has flaws.

Because once you survive with the Void Sparrow, the copy talent and the Void Sparrow are not perfectly integrated, but are only temporarily borrowed.

Therefore, the ontology of human beings is the real core.

But the life level of the Void Sparrow is too high, and his comprehension is too high, and it is the first time he has seen such a terrifying life, so he naturally wants to fuse the body of the Void Sparrow.

It's like when he fused the Black Silent Sea, the Devouring Mountain, and the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, he let his life level skyrocket.

It's a pity that he realized that kind of secret technique by luck, and he can't use it anymore.

Moreover, that kind of secret technique could only swallow the life of a half-step perfect controller, and it was impossible to devour a life like the Void Sparrow.

"Maybe I can create another secret art similar to Life Eater. "

Ye Tian decided.

Such a secret technique must be created with the power of the Extreme Dao, otherwise the grade will not be enough.

Therefore, he still needs to master some extreme powers, among which the devouring extreme path must be mastered, the life extreme path, and the death extreme path, and all other extreme paths, all of which can be realized.

"There's no hurry for the time being, anyway, that Void Sparrow doesn't know when it will be able to give birth, and when it is conceived, I will almost have created that kind of secret technique!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

In the following years, Ye Tian comprehended the Extreme Dao of Gold in the Extreme Dao Mountain, and at the same time used the Void Dark Sparrow Egg to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Speed.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally comprehended the Golden Extreme Dao, and the Speed Extreme Dao had already comprehended it.

At this point, Ye Tian now mastered a total of six extreme powers.

"I have to continue to meditate, and then continue to contemplate the devouring pole path, the life pole path, the death pole and other kinds of pole paths!"

Ye Tian planned.

Other super-perfect masters don't have to comprehend so many extreme paths, so it's meaningless and a complete waste of time.

In fact, they are not able to comprehend so many extreme paths, so they do not have enough potential, and they only comprehend the extreme paths that fit their own.

But Ye Tian had copied too many perfect-level ancestral endowments, so he could comprehend any kind of extreme path, and it would not be too difficult, this was his anti-heaven.

And only Ye Tiancai had the hope of creating an Extreme Dao Secret Technique that devoured and fused the Void Void Bird, turned into its own potential, and strengthened its life level.

In the blink of an eye, millions of eternal years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already condensed the power of fifteen extreme paths, including devouring extreme paths and other extreme paths.

And after comprehending and condensing so much Extreme Dao power, Ye Tian had already come to the top of Extreme Dao Mountain.

There were only six super-level perfect masters here who were cultivating, and when they saw Ye Tian coming to the top of the mountain, they were immediately stunned.

A half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm actually walked to the top of the Extreme Dao Mountain, isn't this a joke?
